summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AcuWall Hungarian noise barrier website. Tested homepage, navigation, quote form functionality, mobile responsiveness, and contact information display.

ui_bugs.issue: URL encoding issue with /munkavédelem route - Hungarian characters causing navigation problems

integration_issues.issue: Some navigation links not working properly in automated testing - may be timing or routing related

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with hero section and navigation
Logo displays properly in header and footer
Quote form functionality works completely - form submission and reset
Mobile responsive navigation menu works perfectly
Contact page displays correct email (acuwall@acuwall.hu) and phone (+36 30 830 5556)
Quote page form has all required fields and validation
Header CTA button navigates to quote page correctly
Footer contact links have correct href attributes
All mobile navigation links are visible and functional
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Most functionality working, minor navigation issues
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix URL encoding issue for /munkavédelem route to ensure proper navigation. Consider using URL-safe route names or proper encoding handling for Hungarian characters.
